title: botrychium lunaria f. minganense
intro: Botrychium lunaria f. minganense, also known as the mingan moonwort, is a variety of the moonwort plant, a type of fern that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. Traditionally, the moonwort plant has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may be attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of mingan moonwort include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible role in supporting the immune system and reducing oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of mingan moonwort may be made by drying and processing the plant, and it is often used in traditional medicine in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
